creator: smyru@heron.pl
text:
I have found a workaround for the bug. The Terminal will always
crash when an option MiscAlwaysShowTabs is set to TRUE in
$HOME/.config/Terminal/terminalrc.

I use Fluxbox as my WM. And I was used to set this true, since the
couple, Fluxbox and Terminal experienced difficult relationship in
the past due to a bug, where maximized Terminal with one session and
no tabs shown, would create a tab and then bottom of Terminal window
was dropping off screen.

-- 
 Piotr Smyrak
 piotr.smyrak@heron.pl
